Code of Conduct
===============

Purpose
-------

This project aims to maintain a welcoming, respectful, and collaborative
environment for all contributors.

Standards
---------

Participants are expected to:
    - Be respectful and considerate.
    - Provide constructive feedback.
    - Avoid harassment, discrimination, or abusive behavior.

Unacceptable Behavior
---------------------

Examples include:
    - Personal attacks
    - Harassment or discrimination
    - Disruptive or hostile behavior

Enforcement
-----------

Violations may result in:
    - Warnings
    - Temporary or permanent bans from contributing

Reporting
---------

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior:
    Contact the project maintainer privately.

End of File
-----------
